mutationPolicy: Rebuild each active file from HEAD baseline, then change only active text.DRB from exact local DRB raw source mapping.
note: Dirty-branch recovery rebuilt each active file from HEAD baseline and then changed only text.DRB from exact local DRB raw source mapping. Residual rows are recorded as versification/source-shape blockers.
